modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message on touch panel: Kramer serial tunnel disconnected

full_description_text: I'm getting a warning message on the touch panel. It says "Kramer serial tunnel disconnected." This happens in the smart classroom, and I don't know what to do. Please help me with this issue.
short_description: Error message on touch panel: Kramer serial tunnel disconnected
description: I'm getting a warning message on the touch panel. It says "Kramer serial tunnel disconnected." This happens in the smart classroom, and I don't know what to do. Please help me with this issue.
